ALTER USER user1 GRANTEES ANY EXCEPT user2;
ALTER USER user1 DEFAULT ROLE role1, role2;
ALTER USER user1 GRANTEES user2, user3;
ALTER USER user1 GRANTEES user2, EXCEPT user3;
ALTER USER user1 IDENTIFIED WITH 'password' ADD 'oauth';
ALTER USER user1 IDENTIFIED BY 'new_password' VALID UNTIL '2023-12-31 23:59:59';
ALTER USER user1 IDENTIFIED BY 'new_password' VALID UNTIL '2024-01-01 00:00:00' ADD 'ldap';
ALTER USER user1 IDENTIFIED WITH 'hashed' VALID UNTIL 'infinity' ADD 'saml';
ALTER USER user1 IDENTIFIED BY 'new_password' RESET;
ALTER USER user1 IDENTIFIED WITH 'no_password' ADD 'oauth', 'saml';
ALTER USER user1 DEFAULT ROLE role1 EXCEPT role2;
ALTER USER user1 GRANTEES user2, user3, user4;
ALTER USER user1 IDENTIFIED BY 'password' VALID UNTIL '2023-12-31 00:00:00' ADD 'ldap' VALID UNTIL '2024-01-01 00:00:00';
ALTER USER user2 GRANTEES ANY EXCEPT user3, user4;
ALTER USER user1 RESET IDENTIFIED BY 'new_password' VALID UNTIL '2023-12-31 23:59:59';
